inputs.prompt: Task Router build/deploy work item and target platform requirements
inputs.context: Pipeline context including build artifacts, packaging constraints, and release targets

outputs.primary: Build and release artifacts with reproducible commands and validation evidence
outputs.format: Release report: artifacts, steps, checks, failures, and rollback notes

failure_handling.on_build_failure: Identify root cause; fix deterministically; update scripts; rerun full verification
failure_handling.on_deploy_failure: Rollback safely; capture logs; propose minimal corrective change
